title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
summary: PP-OCRv6, now on Hugging Face, offers multilingual OCR supporting 50 languages with model sizes ranging from 1.5M to 34.5M parameters. It balances efficiency and accuracy, making it suitable for diverse deployment scenarios from edge devices to cloud servers.
